# 👋 Welcome to UEFN Blender Bridge!

Thanks for stopping by. This is the community hub for the **UEFN Blender
Bridge** — a live two-way bridge between Blender and UEFN.

The tool is **stable (v1.0.2)** and open source under MIT. It's young, so your
feedback will directly shape where it goes next. If you're here early, you're a
founding member of the community — thank you 🙏.

## What Discussions are for

Use **Discussions** for anything that isn't a concrete bug report:

- 💡 **Ideas & feature requests** — "I wish it could do X"
- ❓ **Questions** — "How do I set this up for my workflow?"
- 🎨 **Show & tell** — screenshots, videos, or timelapses of what you built
  using the bridge
- 🛠️ **Workflow tips** — share the way *you* use the bridge, learn from
  others
- 💬 **General chat** — Blender ↔ UEFN talk, DCC pipeline topics, anything
  relevant

Use **[Issues](https://github.com/KiKoZl1/uefn-blender-bridge/issues)** only
for **reproducible bugs** — crashes, broken sync, wrong coordinates, etc.
If you're not sure whether something is a bug, post in Discussions first
and we'll convert it to an Issue if needed.

## Before you post

- Check the [README](https://github.com/KiKoZl1/uefn-blender-bridge#readme),
  [Installation guide](https://github.com/KiKoZl1/uefn-blender-bridge/blob/main/docs/installation.md),
  and [Troubleshooting](https://github.com/KiKoZl1/uefn-blender-bridge/blob/main/docs/troubleshooting.md)
  — your answer may already be there.
- Search existing discussions — someone may have asked the same thing.
- When asking for help, include your Blender version, UEFN version, OS,
  and what you already tried.

## Community rules

Short version: **be kind, be patient, be useful**.

1. **Respect everyone.** No harassment, no hostility, no gatekeeping. Every
   TA started somewhere.
2. **Stay on topic.** This community is about Blender ↔ UEFN workflows,
   not general Fortnite creative debates, piracy, or unrelated gamedev drama.
3. **Don't spam.** No self-promotion unless it's directly relevant to the
   bridge (e.g. a tutorial you made using it). Ask before cross-posting.
4. **Keep the license intact.** The bridge is [MIT-licensed](https://github.com/KiKoZl1/uefn-blender-bridge/blob/main/LICENSE)
   — you're free to use, modify, and redistribute it, including in commercial
   UEFN projects; just keep the `LICENSE` / attribution. If it helps you, the
   best thanks is a ⭐ and a contribution back.
5. **It's young software.** Edge cases will show up. Report clearly, stay
   constructive, and we'll fix it together.

## Introduce yourself 👇

Drop a comment below and tell us:

- **Who you are** — handle, studio, role (TA, level designer, hobbyist, etc.)
- **What you build** in UEFN — islands, experiences, client work, side
  projects
- **What pulled you to this bridge** — what was painful in your old
  workflow?
- **Anything you'd love to see** in future versions

The more context the community has, the better we can all help each other.

*If the bridge saves you time, the best thanks is a star ⭐ on the repo and
your honest feedback in here. Let's build something great together.*
